zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor於1231年出生在英國波藍德卡萊爾時，他的父親John de Braose34歲，母親Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire24歲。他於1260年9月9日與Alice le Rus在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年6月18日在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇享年61歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor于1231年出生在英国波藍德卡萊爾时，他的父亲John de Braose34岁，母亲Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire24岁。他于1260年9月9日与Alice le Rus在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年6月18日在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇享年61岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor was born in 1231, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, his father, John de Braose, was 34 and his mother, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, was 24. He married Alice le Rus on 9 September 1260, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 June 1292, in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor est né en 1231, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, John de Braose, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice le Rus le 9 septembre 1260, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 juin 1292, à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor 1231 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Braose 34 und seine Mutter Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire 24. Er hat am 9. September 1260 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Alice le Rus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Juni 1292 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor è nato il nel 1231 nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, John de Braose, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice le Rus il 9 settembre 1260, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 giugno 1292, nel Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manorが1231年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで生まれた時，父John de Braoseは34歳，母Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshireは24歳であった。1260年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでAlice le Rusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年6月18日にイギリススフォルクウッドブリッジで61歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor(이)가 1231년 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Braose(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1260년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Alice le Rus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 6월 18일 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor nasceu em 1231, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Braose, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice le Rus em 9 de setembro de 1260, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de junho de 1292, em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor родился в 1231 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Braose было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice le Rus 9 сентября 1260 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 июня 1292 г. в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor nació en 1231, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Braose, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice le Rus el 9 de septiembre de 1260, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de junio de 1292, en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
